steps.title: Identify the progression
steps.content: Seismic monitoring indicates “roughly where” an impact occurred, and then orbital imaging is used on the resulting “relatively limited area” to “precisely locate” the crater. This progression shows one method's output directly enables the other method's work.

steps.title: Match the relationship to the best term
steps.content: Complementary describes methods that work together effectively, each providing a distinct function the other requires. The other choices fail to capture this relationship: redundant implies duplication, exhaustive implies complete coverage, and interchangeable implies equivalence. That matches choice C — C is correct.
